title: Refactor grove into a Cargo workspace (grove-core library + grove CLI)
goal: Split the single grove binary crate into a Cargo workspace with a clap-free grove-core library and a thin grove CLI, publish both to crates.io, and preserve zero end-user impact.
description: Tracks GitHub issue #50. Migrate the binary-only crate to a virtual workspace: core/ (grove-core, public lib API over engine/ops/registry/fetch/ingest + provision_project) and cli/ (grove, retains binary name; main.rs + mcp.rs + agent-harness init). Update CI/release tooling and publish grove-core to crates.io.
